title: geopoly-simplify: Topology-Preserving Simplification of Geological Map Vector Data
description: geopoly-simplify is a Python tool for topology-preserving simplification of geological map polygon and fault-line shapefiles at multiple target scales. It implements a Modified Visvalingam-Whyatt algorithm within a three-stage pipeline: topology pre-processing (coordinate snapping, hairline overlap and gap correction, bidirectional fault-polygon vertex alignment), fault network simplification with polygon-boundary vertex pinning, and polygon simplification with junction pinning, unique geological contact preservation, and thin-body collapse prevention. Outputs are gap-free and overlap-free, with fault lines remaining aligned with polygon boundaries. Developed and tested on the GSWA Ninghan 1:500 000 and GSSA Flinders Ranges geological datasets.
